title: The Requisitioning and Acquisition of Immovable Property Act, 1952
full_text: The Requisitioning and Acquisition of Immovable Property Act, 1952 स्थावर सम्पत्ति अधिग्रहण और अर्जन अधिनियम, 1952 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1952-30 Act Number: 30 Enactment Date: 1952-03-14 Act Year: 1952 Short Title: The Requisitioning and Acquisition of Immovable Property Act, 1952 Hindi Title: स्थावर सम्पत्ति अधिग्रहण और अर्जन अधिनियम, 1952 Long Title: An Act to provide for the requisitioning and acquisition of immovable property for the purposes of the Union.स्थावर सम्पत्ति अधिग्रहण और अर्जनअधिनियम, 1952 Ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs Enforcement Date: 14-03-1952 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Requisitioning and Acquisition of Immovable Property Act, 1952 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and duration. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power to requisition immovable property. Section 4. Power to take possession of requisitioned property. Section 5. Rights over requisitioned property. Section 6. Release from requisitioning. Section 7. Power to acquire requisitioned property. Section 8. Principles and method of determining compensation. Section 9. Payment of compensation. Section 10. Appeals from orders of requisitioning. Section 11. Appeals from awards in respect of compensation. Section 12. Competent authority and arbitrator to have certain powers of civil courts. Section 13. Power to obtain information. Section 14. Power to enter and inspect. Section 15. Service of notice and orders. Section 16. Easement not to be disturbed. Section 17. Delegation of powers. Section 18. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 19. Bar of jurisdiction of civil courts. Section 20. Penalty for offences. Section 21. Certain persons to be public servants. Section 22. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 23. Validation of certain requisitions and acquisitions. Section 24. Repeals and savings. Section 25. Special provision as to certain requisitions under Act 51 of 1962. Section 26. Special provision as to certain requisitions under Act 42 of 1971.
